content: Phase 5.0 - Read projection_diagnostics + engines_summary, write reports/v1_4_micros_vs_majors.md (ES vs MES, YM vs MYM short bullets)
Phase 5.1a - Drop RollDetectionParams.atr_mult default 10.0 to 8.0 (user-locked threshold)
Phase 5.1b - Create scripts/run_roll_audit.py to compute legacy(5x ATR) vs v1.4(8x+cal+vol) counts per instrument
Phase 5.1c - Add tests/test_roll_detection.py (legacy>v1.4, no-lookahead, calendar gate)
Phase 5.1d - Run roll audit; save reports/v1_4_roll_candidates.csv + reports/v1_4_roll_audit.md
Phase 5.1e - Run full pytest (49 PASS); update BLOCKERS.md §9/§28 with actual numbers
Phase 5.1 STOP - Report before/after counts to user; total v1.4=498 (over 150-350 band), driven by MGC/MCL. Await user guidance.
Phase 5.2 - Add backtest correctness tests (next-bar fill, no-lookahead, stop-first, session-end, family concurrency, roll-skip)
Phase 5.2 - Create src/sfpe/backtest/portfolio.py for portfolio-level family concurrency
Phase 5.3 - Write scripts/run_backtest.py runner (9 instruments, 2 thresholds, 3 cost models, 3 slippages)
Phase 5.4 - Trade count audit FIRST; STOP and report if portfolio<200 or per-instrument<50
Phase 5.4 - Final Phase 5 deliverables (summary MD, equity curves PNG, baseline table, slippage table, stress columns)
